name: Cajun Rice & Seafood Supreme
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lbs Raw Shrimp, peeled, may be chopped
Seasoning: Cayenne Pepper, Salt and Pepper, Garlic Salt, Tabasco Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a 6-quart saucepan.
2. Saute onions, bell pepper, and celery on medium heat for several minutes.
3. Add flour and cook for 1-2 minutes.
4. Stir in half and half, sour cream, cheese, parsley flakes, and seasoning.
5. Cook until all the cheese is melted.
6. Add shrimp, crabmeat, and mushrooms; cook on medium heat for 20 minutes or until the shrimp and crabmeat are well cooked.
7. Add pimentos for color.
8. Fold in the cooked rice and stir to combine with the sauce.
9. Serve warm. This dish can also be served in pastry shells. Serves 15.
Festival: International Rice Festival; October 20-22, 1995.
